mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.college_name, m.major_name, cl.class_name FROM edu_student s LEFT JOIN edu_college c ON s.college_id = c.id LEFT JOIN edu_major m ON s.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN edu_class cl ON s.class_id = cl.id WHERE s.id = #{id}

SELECT s.*, c.college_name, m.major_name, cl.class_name FROM edu_student s LEFT JOIN edu_college c ON s.college_id = c.id LEFT JOIN edu_major m ON s.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN edu_class cl ON s.class_id = cl.id WHERE s.student_no = #{studentNo}

SELECT s.*, c.college_name, m.major_name, cl.class_name FROM edu_student s LEFT JOIN edu_college c ON s.college_id = c.id LEFT JOIN edu_major m ON s.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN edu_class cl ON s.class_id = cl.id WHERE s.class_id = #{classId} AND s.status = 1 ORDER BY s.student_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_student ( student_no, name, gender, birth_date, id_card, phone, email, college_id, major_id, class_id, enrollment_year, status, avatar ) VALUES ( #{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{idCard}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{collegeId}, #{majorId}, #{classId}, #{enrollmentYear}, #{status}, #{avatar} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE edu_student
name = #{name},
gender = #{gender},
birth_date = #{birthDate},
id_card = #{idCard},
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
status = #{status},
avatar = #{avatar},
WHERE id = #{id}
